comment: Class used to handle comparison logic (used primarily for sorting Collection objects)
commentblock: &lt;div class=&quot;description&quot;&gt;	&lt;ul class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;		&lt;li class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;			&lt;div class=&quot;comments&quot;&gt;&lt;!-- comment --&gt;&lt;pre&gt;Class used to handle comparison logic (used primarily for sorting Collection objects)&lt;/pre&gt;&lt;/div&gt;			&lt;hr /&gt;		&lt;/li&gt;	&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
commenthtml: Class used to handle comparison logic (used primarily for sorting Collection objects)
inlinecomment: &apos; Class used to handle comparison logic (used primarily for sorting Collection objects)

methods.label: compare
methods.comment: Main function that does the comparison. Only needs to code for natural before/after. The outer function will reverse the result if the Comparator is instantiated as descending order or Collection has been reversed.
methods.codesample:
%REM
The following code is Comparator.compareAscDesc.
%END REM
Public Function compareAscDesc(source as Variant, target as Variant, collReversed as Boolean) as Integer
    compareAscDesc = compare(source, target)
    If (m_isDescending Xor collreversed) Then Return 0 - compareAscDesc Else Return compareAscDesc
End Function
methods.signature: Function compare(source As Variant, target As Variant) As Integer
methods.commentblock: &lt;div class=&quot;description&quot;&gt;	&lt;ul class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;		&lt;li class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;			&lt;div class=&quot;comments&quot;&gt;&lt;!-- comment --&gt;&lt;pre&gt;Main function that does the comparison. Only needs to code for natural before/after. The outer function will reverse the result if the Comparator is instantiated as descending order or Collection has been reversed.&lt;/pre&gt;&lt;/div&gt;			&lt;hr /&gt;		&lt;/li&gt;	&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
methods.commenthtml: Main function that does the comparison. Only needs to code for natural before/after. The outer function will reverse the result if the Comparator is instantiated as descending order or Collection has been reversed.
methods.inlinecomment: &apos; Main function that does the comparison. Only needs to code for natural before/after. The outer function will reverse the result if the Comparator is instantiated as descending order or Collection has been reversed.
methods.codesamplehtml: %REM&lt;br /&gt;The following code is Comparator.compareAscDesc.&lt;br /&gt;%END REM&lt;br /&gt;Public Function compareAscDesc(source as Variant, target as Variant, collReversed as Boolean) as Integer&lt;br /&gt;    compareAscDesc = compare(source, target)&lt;br /&gt;    If (m_isDescending Xor collreversed) Then Return 0 - compareAscDesc Else Return compareAscDesc&lt;br /&gt;End Function

methods.label: compareAscDesc
methods.comment:
Compares source and target, returning -1 if source is before target, 0 if they are the same, 1 if source is after target.
The value is reversed (so -1 changed to 1, 1 changed to -1) if:
- Comparator is descending, but Collection is not reversed
- Comparator is ascending, but Collection is reversed
methods.codesample:
%REM
The following code is abbreviated code from Collection.getIndex. It compares each element against the value being checked, and if it matches, returns the current index.
%END REM
Public Function getIndex(checkValue as Variant) as Variant
    ForAll elem in Me.p_content)
        If (Me.Comparator.compareAscDesc(checkValue, elem, Me.p_isCollReversed) = 0) Then Return ListTag(elem)
    End ForAll
End Function
methods.signature: Function compareAscDesc(source As Variant, target As Variant, collReversed As Boolean) As Integer
methods.argumentsuffix: (source As Variant, target As Variant, collReversed As Boolean)

arguments.label: collReversed
arguments.comment: Whether the parent Collection is reversed
arguments.commenthtml: Whether the parent Collection is reversed
arguments.inlinecomment: &apos; Whether the parent Collection is reversed

methods.label: equals
methods.comment:
Function to determine if two values are determined to be identical.
Used by remove, replace, and contains functions
methods.codesample:
%REM
The following code is Collection.getIndex().
%END REM
ForAll elem in p_content
    If (Me.comparator.equals(checkValue, elem)) Then Return ListTag(elem)
End ForAll
methods.signature: Function equals(source As Variant, target As Variant) As Boolean
methods.commentblock: &lt;div class=&quot;description&quot;&gt;	&lt;ul class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;		&lt;li class=&quot;blockList&quot;&gt;			&lt;div class=&quot;comments&quot;&gt;&lt;!-- comment --&gt;&lt;pre&gt;Function to determine if two values are determined to be identical.&lt;br /&gt;Used by remove, replace, and contains functions&lt;/pre&gt;&lt;/div&gt;			&lt;hr /&gt;		&lt;/li&gt;	&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
